title: Girls' Last Tour OST
description: This resource pack adds all the tracks from the Girls' Last Tour.
body:
This resource pack adds all the tracks from the Girls' Last Tour.
You'll have to find out yourself which songs play where, but i've done my best to make them fit where they play as I didn't want their placement to be random and unfitting.
Advantages:
 Audio quality (FLAC to OGG)
 Music distribution (All tracks from the OST were used)
